privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy explaining what personal information I collect, how I use it, and your rights regarding that information.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Your privacy is important to me. This Privacy Policy explains what personal information I collect, how I use it, and your rights regarding that information when you visit this portfolio website.

Information I Collect

Information You Provide: When you fill out the contact form, I collect your name, email address, and any message you include. If you subscribe to my newsletter, I collect your email address.

Information Collected Automatically: Usage data (pages visited, time spent, referral source) and device information (browser type, operating system, IP address).

How I Use Your Information

To respond to your inquiries, send newsletters (if subscribed), improve the website, and monitor site performance.

Third-Party Services

I use the following third-party services: UploadThing (file uploads), Vercel (hosting), Neon DB (database), Resend (email), and Google Analytics (analytics).

Contact

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please get in touch.

terms.metaDescription: Terms of Service governing your use of this website and the services offered.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
These Terms of Service govern your use of this website and the services offered. By accessing or using this site, you agree to be bound by these terms.

Services

I provide freelance web development, software development, and consulting services. The scope, deliverables, timeline, and pricing for each project will be outlined in a separate agreement or proposal.

Intellectual Property

All content on this website is my intellectual property unless otherwise noted. Upon full payment, clients receive ownership of the custom code and deliverables created specifically for their project.

Limitation of Liability

The services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. My total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by the client for the specific project giving rise to the claim.

Contact

If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact me.

cookies.metaDescription: Cookies Policy explaining how this website uses cookies and how you can control them.
cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.content:
Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, tablet, or phone) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, enhance your browsing experience, and provide information to the site owners.

This site uses essential cookies for functionality and analytics cookies (via Google Analytics) to understand how visitors interact with the site. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

For more information, please contact me.
